title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Scootsy Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Scootsy Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Scootsy Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scootsy Holdings Services:
Scootsy Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
